initial_program:
row(R) :- input(R, _, _).
col(C) :- input(_, C, _).

max_row(Rmax) :- row(Rmax), Rmax = #max{ X : row(X) }.

cell(R, C) :- input(R, C, _).

% Change to 3 if the cell is interior (not top row, not left column,
% not the bottom row) and either its row index or column index is at least 3
allowed(R, C, 3) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 3, R > 0, C > 0, R != max_row(Rmax), R >= 3.
allowed(R, C, 3) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 3, R > 0, C > 0, R != max_row(Rmax), C >= 3.

% Keep the original colour when the cell does not satisfy the 3rule
allowed(R, C, Color) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 3, not allowed(R, C, 3).

% Exactly one output colour per cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : allowed(R, C, Color) } 1 :- cell(R, C).

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
row(R) :- input(R, _, _).
col(C) :- input(_, C, _).

max_row(Rmax) :- row(Rmax), Rmax = #max{ X : row(X) }.

cell(R, C) :- input(R, C, _).

% Change to 3 if the cell is interior (not top row, not left column,
% not the bottom row) and either its row index or column index is at least 3
allowed(R, C, 3) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 3, R > 0, R >= 3, C > 0, C >= 3.
allowed(R, C, 3) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 3, R > 0, C > 0, R >= 3, C >= 3.

% Keep the original colour when the cell does not satisfy the 3rule
allowed(R, C, Color) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 3, not allowed(R, C, 3).

% Exactly one output colour per cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : allowed(R, C, Color) } 1 :- cell(R, C).

#show output/3.

final_program:
row(R) :- input(R, _, _).
col(C) :- input(_, C, _).

max_row(Rmax) :- row(Rmax), Rmax = #max{ X : row(X) }.

cell(R, C) :- input(R, C, _).

% Change to 3 if the cell is interior (not top row, not left column,
% not the bottom row) and either its row index or column index is at least 3
allowed(R, C, 3) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 3, R > 0, R >= 3, C > 0, C >= 3.
allowed(R, C, 3) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 3, R > 0, C > 0, R >= 3, C >= 3.

% Keep the original colour when the cell does not satisfy the 3rule
allowed(R, C, Color) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 3, not allowed(R, C, 3).

% Exactly one output colour per cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : allowed(R, C, Color) } 1 :- cell(R, C).

#show output/3.
